row2_auxiliary_summary.ego_motion_trend: Forward movement along a wet industrial road with slight lateral adjustments.
row2_auxiliary_summary.main_object_trajectory_trend: Red 3D boxes indicate static or slow-moving trucks and trailers parked on the left; blue lines suggest lane boundaries and trajectory paths.

semantic.scene_summary: Industrial area with wet pavement under overcast skies. Multiple semi-trucks and trailers are parked along the left side of the road. A multi-story brick building is visible in the background. The scene includes parked cars, utility poles, and loading docks.
semantic.visibility_notes: Visibility is reduced due to rain and overcast conditions. Reflections on wet pavement obscure some ground details. Objects remain clearly identifiable despite weather.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Scene progresses smoothly with consistent camera motion forward. No abrupt jumps or discontinuities observed.
logical.object_continuity: All vehicles and structures remain continuously visible without sudden appearance or disappearance. Positions change gradually with ego motion.
logical.structure_continuity: Road layout, building positions, and roadside elements maintain spatial consistency throughout the sequence.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego vehicle moves forward steadily along the road, maintaining lane position.
decision.risk_context: Wet road conditions may reduce traction, but no immediate hazards or emergency maneuvers are required. Traffic appears stationary or slow-moving.

semantic.scene_summary: Similar industrial setting with wet roads and parked trucks. However, visual fidelity is degraded compared to Row 1. Some objects appear blurred or distorted.
semantic.visibility_notes: Significant blurring and loss of detail. Some objects merge visually or lose definition. Rain effects are present but less realistic.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Temporal progression is generally smooth but exhibits flickering and warping artifacts. Object boundaries shift unnaturally at times.
logical.object_continuity: Most objects persist across frames, but their shapes and positions show instability. Some objects appear to dissolve or reappear inconsistently.
logical.structure_continuity: Building and road structures maintain general alignment but suffer from geometric distortions and edge smearing.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego motion appears forward and steady, though slightly jittery due to generation artifacts.
decision.risk_context: Reduced scene clarity and object stability may impair downstream perception systems. No clear emergency situation, but confidence in hazard detection is lowered.
